rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARY JAN CHOW YEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Orders Denying Access To Court: (1) Order Of 05-26-2016 Denying Access To Court By Interfering With Attorney-Client Relationship; And (2) Failure To Respond To Ex Parte Motion For Amendment Of 09-19-2014 Order For Entitlement To Estate Distribution; Memorandum In Support; Declaration Of Yun Shang Zhou; Request For Judicial Notice; Proposed Order.
rulings.Rulings: The motion for reconsideration is denied. The motion is untimely under CCP Section 1008(a). The prevailing party must submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest must notify opposing counsel and the court no later than 7/27/2016, at 4:00 p.m.
